data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — Tests require: (1) dedicated Convert-to-Epic Path section heading, (2) close-after-create order, (3) original ticket ID traceability, (4) --reason flag + open children edge cases, (5) Type Detection Gate Option (a) delegates without inline ticket transition. RED marker [test_convert_section_exists] not present in .test-index (already removed or never added).
